summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaintSal Labs Metering v3 Production Spec. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All metering UI components verified with correct production prices ($0/$27/$97/$297/$497).
test_credentials: No auth required - metering uses user_id parameter. Default user_id='anonymous' defaults to 'pro' tier.
seed_data_creation: None - metering system creates user records on first access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Metering v3 production spec fully tested. Key changes from v2: prices updated to $27/$97/$297/$497, 4 compute levels (Mini $0.05/Pro $0.25/Max $0.75/Max Fast $1.00), 65+ integrations catalog, hard/soft cap logic, formation products with Stripe IDs.

backend: GET /api/metering/tier-info - Returns 5 tiers with correct prices ($0, $27, $97, $297, $497)
GET /api/metering/tier-info - Returns Stripe product_id and monthly_price_id for each tier
GET /api/metering/tier-info - Returns cap_type (hard for free/starter, soft for pro/teams, none for enterprise)
GET /api/metering/tier-info - Returns formation_products with Stripe price_ids
GET /api/metering/compute-levels - Returns min_tier requirements for each level
POST /api/metering/check-access - Free user blocked from business_bizplan (403)
POST /api/metering/check-access - 403 response includes stripe_price_id and required_price
POST /api/metering/check-access - Pro user allowed for business_bizplan (200)
POST /api/metering/log - Tracks usage with compute_level and calculates cost_usd
POST /api/metering/log - cost_usd = compute_minutes * rate_per_min (e.g., 10 min @ max = $7.50)
GET /api/metering/dashboard - Returns full dashboard with cost, overage, action breakdown
Hard cap logic - Free/Starter return 429 when compute exhausted
Soft cap logic - Pro/Teams allow overage (returns overage: true)
frontend: Sidebar metering widget - Shows PRO badge, credits (0/2000), progress bar, rate limit (300/300 req/hr)
Topbar compute meter - Shows dynamic '2000 / 2000 credits' that updates
Tier gate modal - Appears when Free user tries Pro feature (business_bizplan)
Tier gate modal - Shows correct prices: Starter $27, Pro $97 (RECOMMENDED), Teams $297
Pricing page - Shows all 5 tiers with correct prices: $0, $27, $97, $297, $497
Tier badge updates - Changes from PRO to FREE when tier is changed via API

test_flow_executed: 1. GET /api/metering/tier-info - verified 5 tiers with correct prices and Stripe IDs
2. GET /api/metering/compute-levels - verified 4 levels with correct rates
4. POST /set-tier to free - verified tier change
5. POST /check-access for 'business_bizplan' - correctly returns 403 with stripe_price_id
6. POST /set-tier back to pro - verified tier change
7. POST /check-access - correctly returns 200 for Pro user
8. POST /log with compute_level='max' - verified cost_usd calculation
9. Hard cap test - Free user blocked with 429 when compute exhausted
10. Soft cap test - Pro user allowed with overage flag when compute exhausted
11. Frontend: Verified sidebar widget shows PRO badge and credits
12. Frontend: Verified tier gate modal shows $27/$97/$297 prices
13. Frontend: Verified pricing page shows all 5 tier prices correctly
